title: CoRSIV variably-methylated regions are enriched 1.676-fold at identity-dependent TEs and the enrichment survives GC- and length-stratified permutation

subject.display: Migration cohort for 'CoRSIV variably-methylated regions are enriched 1.676-fold at identity-dependent'
subject.note: Inclusion predicates intentionally empty at migration time; the implicit member set is defined by the v1.1 premises. Re-author with explicit inclusion predicates to tighten the subject.

source.note: Per-TE surveillance mode classification from exp03. MOD-3 loaded 4,965,852 TEs after dropping 40,239 with NA surv_mode.

Correlated Regions of Systemic Interindividual Variation (CoRSIVs) from Gunasekara et al. 2019 Genome Biology. BED file at internal/InSilico/TE surveillance/data/corsiv_vmrs.bed. 10,045 TEs overlap a CoRSIV (0.20% of the TE corpus).

operations.note: 2x2 contingency: surv_mode == 'identity_dependent' x is_corsiv_overlap. Identity-dependent mode n=196,193; CoRSIV-overlap n=10,045; intersection n=647.
Stratified permutation within 0.02-wide GC bins to control for composition.
Stratified permutation within TE length deciles to control for size.

statistics.name: fisher_odds_ratio_raw
statistics.note: Raw OR from MOD-3 log. Identity-dependent TEs are 1.68x enriched for CoRSIV overlap.

statistics.name: fisher_one_sided_p_raw
statistics.note: Raw one-sided Fisher p from MOD-3 log.

statistics.name: gc_matched_permutation_or
statistics.note: GC-stratified permutation preserved the OR almost exactly (1.676 — no GC attenuation), indicating the enrichment is NOT a GC artifact. Matches the paper1 headline.

statistics.name: gc_matched_permutation_p
statistics.note: Empirical p from 10,000 GC-bin-stratified shuffles; reported as 0.0000 in the log, pinned here at the 1e-4 ceiling.

statistics.name: cochran_mantel_haenszel_or_gc
statistics.note: CMH OR over GC strata from MOD-3: 1.662 (CMH p = 3.00e-36). CMH is an asymptotic parametric companion to the permutation test.

statistics.name: length_matched_permutation_or
statistics.note: Length-decile stratified permutation also preserves the raw OR exactly; rules out TE-size as a confound.

inference.justification: Four conjuncts: (1) raw OR > 1.2 establishes a substantive enrichment above noise; (2) GC-matched permutation OR > 1.2 establishes that the enrichment survives composition matching (the stability of the OR from 1.676 raw to 1.676 GC-stratified is the load-bearing result — no attenuation, no confound); (3) GC-matched permutation p < 0.001 is statistically significant against the GC-controlled null; (4) length-matched OR > 1.2 confirms size is not a confound either. The 1.2 threshold is a mild effect-size floor; the observed 1.676 clears it by 0.48.
inference.failure_mode: If either the GC-matched OR or length-matched OR fell to near 1.0, the enrichment would be a composition/size artifact and the identity-dependent-specific methylation-variability framing would collapse. The stable OR across raw / GC-matched / length-matched is the load-bearing evidence.

conclusion.assertion: Among ~5M autosomal TEs, those classified into the 'identity_dependent' surveillance mode are enriched 1.676-fold for overlap with CoRSIV variably-methylated regions (Gunasekara 2019; raw p = 3.57e-32; n_overlap = 647 of 10,045 CoRSIVs). The enrichment is unchanged (OR = 1.676) under 10,000-iteration GC-stratified and length-stratified permutation (both empirical p < 1e-4), demonstrating that the identity-dependent surveillance mode — not TE composition or size — predicts methylation-variability membership. Consistent with dual KRAB-ZnF + DNA methylation silencing at identity-dependent TEs.

scope.scale_note: One of the 9 mode-marker combinations in MOD-3. Sibling claims: oncoexaptation x active (headline), Retro-Age x identity-dependent.

composite_confidence.note: Paired 10,000-rep permutation over GC and length strata; CI not yet computed.

external_assumptions.statement: Gunasekara 2019 CoRSIV annotations are a faithful catalog of systemic interindividual methylation variability — loci where methylation varies between individuals in ways not explained by SNP genotype.
The identity_dependent surveillance mode (exp03 5-class collapse) cleanly isolates the KRAB-ZnF + DNA methylation dual-silenced population from Polycomb-dominant composition_dependent TEs.
